horoscope: Venus and Jupiter harmonize in your sectors of finances, personal resources, talents, home, and family, dear Aries, favoring money news, good buys, and family fun or enjoyment. If you need to win a family member's favor, this is a good time to do so. In fact, you may enjoy a reconciliation or a clarification that brings you closer to someone you love. Gifts could come in, or others seem to be especially generous with you, and they might even be doting! Domestic security, support, and stability can be important priorities in your life these days, and little things occurring now help you feel a little safer or more comfortable. You may be going out of your way to make sure that people you love are feeling content, protected, and wanted. There can be a stronger desire to enjoy recent victories. You want to feel that you're growing at a comfortable, peaceful pace. Later today is not the best time for attention to detail -- it's better for drawing on your intuition and imagination and how these can apply to business and money matters.

Venus, currently transiting your sign, harmonizes with happy Jupiter today, dear Taurus, and your natural charm heightens even further. You are not only attracting admirers, but you're also drawing in favorable circumstances and opportunities. What started as a problem can turn into a positive today. It's a time of increased cooperation or contentment. You might enjoy some personal time or discover exciting new interests. You especially enjoy creating prosperous situations or bringing more joy to others' lives. Your belief in yourself and others stands out today. Later today, your mood is prone to fluctuations. You could feel excited to pursue a goal or dream, although you could miscalculate some details.

Venus, currently hidden away in your privacy sector, connects harmoniously with generous, lucky Jupiter today, dear Gemini. With this transit, you want to heal, restore yourself, and decompress. While it's not the most productive of times, you see things with more positivity and optimism, which is encouraging and motivating. It can be a time to give your life a boost, whether it's doing something you genuinely enjoy or deciding to get over an issue that has been blocking a relationship or holding back your emotions. There's a natural flow to your plans. You could be supporting someone anonymously or from behind the scenes, making willing sacrifices, and feeling useful and happy for helping out. Business matters can also thrive. Still, judgment could be a little off later today. Your imagination and private world can be especially appealing now.

You're under the lovely influence of a Venus-Jupiter aspect today, dear Cancer, and friendships can be especially rewarding, or someone can be very gracious and generous with you, and this stands out as significant now. There could be opportunities for monetary or social advancement, and you could be quite popular now. Improvements tend to happen as a result of happiness or contentment with yourself. This is about learning to love and accept who you are right now. You're coming across well and easily gain others' cooperation and appreciation. Today is excellent for smoothing out your relationships and connecting or reconnecting with people you care about. You're feeling optimistic and attracting good energy into your life.

You have Jupiter in a private, background area of your solar chart, dear Leo, and you more frequently crave repose, reflection, and rest. With Venus at the top of your chart, however, you're getting noticed. Venus harmonizes with Jupiter today, and you're somehow making all of this work! Activities that are healing, private, or intimate are in great shape right now, and so are endeavors that connect you with others or your higher goals. You readily draw upon support from behind the scenes or your wisdom and intuition. You're inclined to interact in healthy ways. This aspect adds a warm element of faith and belief to the day's energies. Your imagination can get a little wild later today. As long as it takes you to positive places, then you'll be in fine shape. Aim to go with the flow and enjoy a timeout.

There's a jovial quality to your interactions today, dear Virgo, and friendships benefit from sharing ideas, ideals, and encouragement. Moving just a little outside your comfort zone can be most rewarding right now. With a Venus-Jupiter transit in play, you're especially friendly, and others are cooperative and receptive in turn. You have more courage to express your feelings, and you're in the mood for some excitement and adventure. It's also an enjoyable time for educational entertainment. There's some tendency for friends to philosophize with you in enjoyable and perhaps even inspiring ways. Studies can be fun right now, although you're unlikely to dig too deeply at the moment. Later today, there can be a real desire to focus, but part of you is also looking for an escape. There could be a false lead in your work or research. Take a deep breath and recognize that you may simply need to unwind and let your imagination go before returning to goal-chasing.

Today's boosting Venus-Jupiter aspect helps you connect with the right resources, dear Libra. This transit encourages good humor, enjoyment, and healthy expectations of one another. You're in a favorable position for both personal and professional appeal. A generous, open approach brings the greatest rewards. This is also a good time for inspiring faith in your relationships and for coming to peaceful agreements about money, power, and sharing. While you're inclined to emphasize pleasurable activities now, you're in a good position for gently advancing your goals. The good vibes you bring to your work or important projects will bring nice returns. Later today, emotion tends to win over reason, so work on allowing your imagination to take you to a healthier place.

Relationships get a boost today, dear Scorpio, with a harmonious aspect between Venus and Jupiter that brings a spirit of happiness, graciousness, and optimism to your relationships, attitude, and beliefs. You're getting your ideas across to others in delightful, inspiring ways, and agreements are satisfying. Your kindness and openness endear you to others, and people return the favor. With Jupiter, generosity can be about your time, attention, and energy, not just your things. A beautiful, reciprocal flow is happening between you, a partner, your audience, or a counselor. With Venus in your partnership sector these days, you're in a generally good position with others, especially in one-to-one situations. Today, in particular, positive and affirming exchanges or interactions are in focus.

Today is a standout for personal appeal and possibly romantic attention as well, dear Sagittarius. You're inclined to show your affection for someone through your help and support. There can be social opportunities arising through work, services, or the pursuit of health and wellness goals due to a harmonious aspect between Venus and Jupiter, your planetary ruler. Because this aspect occurs in your work, health, and intimacy sectors, working or intimate relationships can thrive in particular. It also suggests you are operating in the background -- this isn't flashy energy. Your natural talents are a little more evident and attractive.

This can be a beautiful day for relating, particularly in partnerships, love affairs, and with artistic peers, dear Capricorn, due to a Venus-Jupiter sextile in your relationship sectors. This can be a time of natural, warm, and generous expressions and gestures. While romantic connections can thrive or begin now, this transit is useful for virtually any relationship, as it injects warmth, trust, and good humor into your interactions. Emotional openness, generosity, and acceptance can be part of this. This is a time of personal popularity! You find it motivating when others are putting their faith in you, as you don't want to let anyone down. Even so, it's not the time to wait for people to make your day, but rather to express to others what you would love to receive in return, such as faith and acceptance. You are magnetizing what you desire, and reciprocity is in focus. Later today, your mind may wander, making it hard to focus on practical tasks. This may be a better time to enjoy some creative fun.

Venus in your home and family sector harmonizes with lucky Jupiter today, dear Aquarius, and generosity and openness are in favor. This works best on a personal level, but it can also benefit your practical affairs. New ways to make your routines, work, or home life pleasant can emerge, and it's a fine time for home decorating or creative work. Going the extra mile at home or in your business can be satisfying, and possibly also profitable! You can be doing an especially good job and feeling great about your accomplishments. As well, you can feel especially protected by and protective of loved ones today, which can strengthen your bonds.

Today's fortunate Venus-Jupiter aspect puts you in perfect shape for communicating and expressing yourself creatively, dear Pisces. This influence encourages an open, honest, and generous approach to your communications and the expression of your love and affection. Giving freely seems to attract the most success now. You might enjoy pouring love and energy into a fun hobby, the arts, or other forms of dramatic entertainment. Your romantic life can improve with conversation and friendly, thoughtful gestures. People find it easier than usual to warm up to you. It's a beautiful time for de-stressing. Sharing your ideas and connecting socially go smoothly and may open doors. A Venus-Neptune minor challenging aspect later today inclines you to dream and reminisce, making it a good time to unwind, but not necessarily strong for clarity, particularly surrounding money and personal possessions.
